reviews.review_description: The Main film Horizon is really fantastic. Seamless experience. Though you can really tell it would be better to see in a real dome theatre!
Videos are 2D only and not the best ones. Kind of boring too.

reviews.review_title: Some cool experinces some not so
reviews.review_description:
So this is free and some like horizons and the tribe called red and the animated ones were really cool and worth it to me. Some like waterball and polar man were not so good. (Polar man the problem is there’s 3 different sets of illustrations to look at but all over the same video) 

All In all worth a download if only for the good ones
